items_flat.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Family (Sol, Terra, Luna) in General Availability
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列（Sol、Terra、Luna）全面開放
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out the GPT-5.6 series for general availability, featuring flagship Sol for complex tasks, balanced Terra, and efficient Luna. The models excel in coding, agentic workflows, cybersecurity, and knowledge work. GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 已將 GPT-5.6 系列全面開放，旗艦 Sol 適合複雜任務，Terra 均衡，Luna 高效。模型在編碼、代理工作流、網路安全和知識工作中表現出色。GPT-5.6 現為 Microsoft 365 Copilot 首選模型。
items_flat.quote: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new standard for both intelligence and efficiency... more successful work for the same spend.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 為智慧與效率樹立新標準……以相同花費完成更多成功工作。

items_flat.title_en: Apple Sues OpenAI Alleging Trade Secret Theft for AI Hardware
items_flat.title_zh: 蘋果起訴 OpenAI 竊取貿易秘密開發 AI 硬體
items_flat.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and two former employees, accusing them of stealing trade secrets related to product designs, manufacturing, and supply chains for OpenAI's consumer hardware ambitions. The suit highlights tensions as OpenAI expands beyond software.
items_flat.summary_zh: 蘋果對 OpenAI 及兩名前員工提起訴訟，指控竊取產品設計、製造和供應鏈貿易秘密，用於 OpenAI 消費硬體開發。此案凸顯 OpenAI 擴展至軟體以外領域的緊張關係。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 發布「Predicting the Past」技能用於歷史研究
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, an agentic AI partner grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models for restoring, dating, and analyzing ancient Greek and Latin inscriptions. It aids historians in processing archaeological data.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past 技能，基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型的代理 AI 夥伴，用於修復、斷代和分析古希臘與拉丁銘文。幫助歷史學家處理考古資料。

openai.summary_en: Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and two former employees, accusing them of stealing trade secrets related to product designs, manufacturing, and supply chains for OpenAI's consumer hardware ambitions. The suit highlights tensions as OpenAI expands beyond software.

google.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
google.title_zh: Google DeepMind 發布「Predicting the Past」技能用於歷史研究
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, an agentic AI partner grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models for restoring, dating, and analyzing ancient Greek and Latin inscriptions. It aids historians in processing archaeological data.
google.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past 技能，基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型的代理 AI 夥伴，用於修復、斷代和分析古希臘與拉丁銘文。幫助歷史學家處理考古資料。

brief_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 family (Sol/Terra/Luna) now in GA with strong coding/agentic capabilities; Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft for AI hardware. Google DeepMind advances historical research tools. No major new model drops today.
brief_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列（Sol/Terra/Luna）全面開放，編碼與代理能力突出；蘋果起訴 OpenAI 竊取貿易秘密用於 AI 硬體。Google DeepMind 推出歷史研究工具。今日無新旗艦模型發布。
